title: eva clothing
wikitext:
[]: eva clothing             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 6:23 pm Anyone know of a good, reliable (ie you've ordered there before and it worked) site where I could find Evangelion apparel? Any help would be appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Tue Jul 06, 2004 9:12 pm There are lots of good sites with Eva swag and stuff on the web One of the most reliable is Anime Nation, they have the latest Eva DVDs and a variety of eva collectables http://www.animenation.com/ They've also just recieved a shipment of Eva 2 action figures ganbatte

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 9:17 pm Thanks, this site will do nicely. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 06, 2004 10:29 pm http://store.yahoo.com/cgi-bin/clink?animenation+BA3fKB+index.html Use this link to visit and purchase from Anime Nation.... it earns me a commission. You can also visit via the affiliate button on the main page. I encourage anyone to buy via anime nation, they have an excellent selection of Eva merche.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 10:32 pm Sure, though I wish I had known about that a little earlier today. I will be making a rather large purchase within a week or so, so expect to get a nice little commission.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 06, 2004 10:48 pm Dave receives awesomeness+1

[]: stuff for sale [old][merged]             Quote Post by KIC » Thu Jun 09, 2005 1:20 pm looky here...: http://www.hlj.com/product/GNXGD-A103

[]:             Quote Post by Prons » Thu Jun 09, 2005 5:56 pm They're really running out of ideas, I'm still waiting for my Rei Ayanami "Personal Massager" to come in the mail. I'd get one, simply becasue it's probably the only anime tie in the known universe.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 10, 2005 10:56 am Why do I get the feeling that the price of that has one too many zeros? 7800 yen is a bit steep for a tie, no matter how rare or well made. I would never pay 72 bucks for a tie, but I would pay $7.20

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Jun 10, 2005 9:33 pm Now they just need those damn condoms.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 10, 2005 9:49 pm I don't want to know.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Sat Jun 11, 2005 1:31 pm Asuka condoms!

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jun 12, 2005 11:08 pm No, "Eva Brand Condoms", remember? "Protection as strong as an A.T. Field", or some similar rot.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 13, 2005 1:33 am I'm still waiting for the Progressive Vibrators.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Jun 13, 2005 1:50 am Plug's not good enough for 'ya?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 13, 2005 1:54 am Well, they're a wee bit on the big side...

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Jun 13, 2005 2:21 am Your emphasis makes the statement appear to state the opposite. But anyway, you expect a P.V. to be any smaller? P.S., I think it's safe to say that we're bored with that tie.

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Mon Jun 13, 2005 7:18 am i'd love one of those ties, if only i was rich or they were cheap.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Jun 13, 2005 11:26 pm That's about what a good tie costs. I wonder if it's that good? (P.S., by "good", I mean, "This tie says 'I paid seventy dollars for an ornamental garment'," like those shitty Fruit-of-the-Loom-esque shirts they sell at Banana Republic for $80+.)

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jun 14, 2005 12:21 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: No, "Eva Brand Condoms", remember? "Protection as strong as an A.T. Field", or some similar rot.
